title: IONumber Function
parameters: IOlabel	String expression that specifies the standard I/O or memory I/O label.
see_also:
Returns the I/O number of the specified I/O label.

IOLabel$

IONumber Function Example

Integer IObit

IObit = IONumber("myIO")

IObit = IONUmber("Station" + Str$(station) + "InCycle")
examples:
Integer IObit

IObit = IONumber("myIO")

IObit = IONUmber("Station" + Str$(station) + "InCycle")
